jobs.prompt: Create a minimal white fashion atelier interior for PURITY Fashion Studio. Empty studio, large soft daylight from the left, white walls, pale floor, one distant garment rail barely visible, sharp editorial negative space, subtle black tailoring marks on a pattern table, quiet luxury mood, no people, no logo, no text, no clutter. Landscape web hero background with empty center space.

Top-down editorial view of white pattern paper, black tailoring curves, measuring tape, a few steel pins, ivory fabric corner, precise atelier drafting composition, monochrome, high-end fashion studio, lots of white negative space, no text, no brand marks, no hands.

Isolated ivory silk fabric fold, elegant tactile drape, soft natural shadow, minimal high-fashion editorial lighting. Object isolated on pure white studio background, centered with clean edges and easy to mask in CSS, no text, no logo, no body, no mannequin.

Tailor mannequin torso with an unfinished ivory silk dress draped over one shoulder, clean sculptural silhouette, luxury atelier lighting, sharp editorial form. Object isolated on pure white studio background with clean edges and easy to mask in CSS, no human face, no head details, no text, no logo.

Close editorial crop of designer hands pinning ivory fabric on a mannequin, only hands and fabric visible, no face, no logo, no text, monochrome ivory and black palette, precise couture atelier mood, natural daylight, tactile detail, premium fashion editorial photography.
